title: ADK-203: Stateful Conversation Memory
author: Google Cloud
description: Implement conversation storage adapters for sliding windows, summarization, Redis caches, and persistent Postgres backends.

features.title: Memory Windows
features.description: Design conversational sliding windows that maintain recent context without exceeding token quotas.

features.title: Redis Cache
features.description: Setup fast memory caches that save session chats with custom TTL timeouts.

features.title: PostgreSQL Store
features.description: Build relational persistence models that store, fetch, and restore multi-user conversations.
